title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXI. Love And Matrimony.
content:
I am a pretty wench,
                And I come a great way hence,
        And sweethearts I can get none:
                But every dirty sow,
                Can get sweethearts enow,
        And I, pretty wench, can get never a one.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXI. Love And Matrimony.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
